positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical mandala design featuring glowing celestial flora (moonflowers, cosmic ferns) intertwined with geometric astral lines and constellations. The style is Neo-Art Nouveau engraving mixed with bioluminescent vaporwave aesthetics. Composition is centered and circular, designed as a seamless repeat pattern for apparel. Strong contrast against a deep midnight blue background. Use a palette of sapphire blue, emerald green, deep indigo, and glowing gold accents. Perfect print quality, high contrast blackwork, vector illustration.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low resolution, low quality, text, watermark, signature, logo, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, amateur, out of focus, distorted, cropped
